lessons.title: LESSONS
exercise.newKeysDesc: Learn these keys in this lesson:
about.title: ABOUT
about.body1: This app was developed to introduce children to touch typing in a fun and accessible way. There are of course many packages and subscriptions available that achieve the same thing. I used this project as an opportunity to design an approach that precisely fits what I believe works best for my own children. Given their enthusiasm, that seems to have worked, and I am happy to share it with anyone who would like the same for their children.
about.body2: From my own software development perspective, this has also been an interesting project. It is a proof of concept to see how AI-assisted development can bring a product from concept to working software in a short time. This project was made possible by Claude Code.
lessons.guideSub: Beginner's guide for posture and technique
progress.title: COACH
progress.coach.noLessons: Complete your first lesson to see your progress!
progress.coach.goodProgress: Nice work! You've unlocked {count} keys so far.
progress.coach.great: Impressive! You know {count} keys — keep going!
progress.coach.tip: When you see {key}, use your {finger}. You often type {wrong} instead.
progress.coach.noTip: Looking good! Keep practicing to build speed.
guide.title: GUIDE
guide.homeRow.title: HOME ROW
guide.homeRow.body: Place your fingers here before you start. Feel the small bumps on F and J; that is where your index fingers rest. After every word, come back to this starting position.
guide.zones.title: FINGER ZONES
guide.zones.body: Every key has one finger responsible for it — shown by color. Your index fingers are the busiest, each covering two columns. Never stretch one finger to reach a key that belongs to another.
guide.eyes.title: EYES ON SCREEN
guide.eyes.body: Look at the letters on screen — not your hands. It feels strange at first, but this is what makes touch typing work. The app shows you which finger to use if you get stuck.
guide.slow.title: START SLOW
guide.slow.body: Type slowly and correctly. Speed builds on its own — mistakes just slow you down in the long run. Three stars means 95% accuracy, not fastest time.
arcade.intro.title: HOW TO PLAY
arcade.intro.step1: Type the glowing word to hop to the next lily pad
arcade.intro.step2: Reach the nest and type its word to score a crossing
arcade.intro.step3: Don't let the current carry you off the screen!
backup.title: BACKUP & RESTORE
backup.saveDesc: Save your progress to a file on this device.
backup.loadDesc: Restore from a previously saved file. New profiles are added; existing ones are updated with your best results.
backup.confirmDesc: This will update existing profiles. Continue?
backup.noProfiles: No valid profiles found in this file.
